name: Steb
description:
After the battle against Ambessa and her army Piltover open their city to Zaun once again, reuniting the 2 sides. However the highly wanted queen of Zaun surrenders herself, but instead of going to jail in still water like she expected Steb suggests she has a second chance, one where she will be under his watch at all times. And so a bond between 2 complete opposite people forms.

Tagged dead dove so anything can happen, have fun with it.
creator: DobbysSock
